recentCommits.message:
feat: Implement Doctor section with loading state, reviews, and context provider

- Added Doctors component to display a list of doctors with their details.
- Integrated loading state using useDoctors context.
- Created Review component to showcase statistics about doctors and patients.
- Developed Hero component for introductory content.
- Enhanced Navbar with brand and links, including an emergency button.
- Implemented Footer with social media links and navigation.
- Created Loading component for better user experience during data fetching.
- Established DoctorContextProvider for managing doctor data and loading state.
- Updated routes to include Doctor layout and components.
- Added utility functions for class name merging and Google Drive link conversion.
- Introduced UI components for buttons, cards, inputs, and separators.
- Updated package dependencies and configurations for improved functionality.

recentCommits.message:
feat: Initialize React Router project with Docker support and Tailwind CSS

- Added .dockerignore and .gitignore files to exclude unnecessary files from builds.
- Removed Prettier and ESLint configurations as part of project restructuring.
- Created Dockerfile for multi-stage builds to optimize production images.
- Updated README.md to reflect new project structure and usage instructions.
- Implemented Booklist, Books, Hero, Navbar, and Wishlist components for displaying book data.
- Established BookProvider context for managing book data and wishlist functionality.
- Set up routing with React Router for navigating between different views.
- Added styling with Tailwind CSS and configured index.css for global styles.
- Created routes for Home, Listed Books, and individual Book details.
- Updated package.json with new dependencies for React Router and Tailwind CSS.
- Removed obsolete files and configurations related to previous build tools.
recentCommits.author: Black Light

recentCommits.message:
refactor: migrate from rspack to rsbuild, update dependencies and configuration

- Changed project name from rspack-react-ts-starter to rsbuild-react-ts.
- Updated build and dev scripts to use rsbuild instead of rspack.
- Removed unused dependencies related to rspack and added necessary rsbuild dependencies.
- Deleted rspack configuration files and created a new rsbuild configuration file.
- Removed PostCSS configuration as it was no longer needed.
- Simplified App component and removed unused assets and components.
- Cleaned up CSS files and removed Tailwind CSS imports.
- Updated TypeScript configuration for better type checking.
- Removed unused utility functions and types.
- Updated index entry point to use ReactDOM.createRoot for rendering.
recentCommits.author: Black Light

recentCommits.message:
refactor: rename project from Rspack to Rsbuild and update configurations

- Updated README to reflect project name change and switch from npm to pnpm for package management.
- Removed unused components and configuration files related to Rspack.
- Updated package.json to use Rsbuild CLI commands and adjusted dependencies.
- Removed Tailwind CSS and related configurations, simplifying styles.
- Refactored App component to provide a cleaner starting point for the application.
- Added new rsbuild.config.ts for Rsbuild configuration.
- Updated TypeScript configuration for improved type checking and module resolution.
